title: Guides:Neon Genesis Evangelion (Episode 03) vs. Evangelion 1.0
wikitext:
← Back to [[Guides:Neon Genesis Evangelion vs. Evangelion 1.0|''Neon Genesis Evangelion'' vs. ''Evangelion 1.0'']].

===Simulation===

[[File:Simulation.png|245px]] [[File:Simulation 1.11.png|320px]]

[[File:Simulation 2.png|245px]] [[File:Simulation 2 1.11.png|320px]]

[[File:Simulator.png|245px]] [[File:Simulator 1.11.png|320px]]

''While, in the original series, Shinji simulates combat inside his Eva, in an analog training, in the movie the training is presented as a virtual reality, done in a machine dedicated to the process.''

===Why throw it away when you can BURN it?===

[[Image:03 C038 trash1.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 trailer2 C67 trash-1.jpg|320px]]

[[Image:03 C038 trash2.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 trailer2 C67 trash-2.jpg|320px]]


===Schoolbound===

[[Image:03 C046 school-walk.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 trailer1 C22 escalator.jpg|320px]]

[[Image:03 C047 shinji-walk.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 hikki-bw C45 escalator.jpg]]

''IF YOU DISAGREE YOU ARE WRONG.''

===Entering the classroom===

[[Image:03 C054 walk-in.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 trailer2 C13 walk-in.jpg|320px]]

''Shinji's already plugged into his music when he walks in; seems like he's gotten even more withdrawn. Alternatively, the other students seem to be vesting a bit more interest from the start (except Kensuke, oddly enough). Toji's being even less subtle than before (an amazing accomplishment, all things considered).''

''If you didn't notice Shinji's switchover to a backpack previously, there it is.''


===The Girl by the Window===

[[Image:03 C056 rei-window.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 hikki-bw C26 rei-window.jpg]]

[[Image:03 C057 rei-window.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 hikki-bw C25 rei-window.jpg]]

''Straightforward retake. The sling is now tucked beneath Rei's collar, rather than draped over it.''


===Silently Staring===

[[Image:03 C058 a shinji-stare.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 hikki-bw C27 a shinji-stare.jpg]]

[[Image:03 C058 b shinji-sit.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 hikki-bw C27 b shinji-sit.jpg]]

''Shinji's expression seems much less ... "forlorn" in Rebuild.''


===The Most One-Sided Fist Fight in Tokyo-3===

[[Image:03 C114 collar-grab 1.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 hikki-bw C12 collar-grab 1.jpg]]

[[Image:03 C114 collar-grab 2.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 hikki-bw C12 collar-grab 2.jpg]]

''The similarities here are very strong. As in, redrawing-the-original-frames-of-animation strong. Not a single unique frame was left behind. [[:Image:Nge-vs-rebuild1 toji-shinji.gif|A two-in-one animated GIF for your perusal]].''


==="Sky. Blue sky."===

[[Image:03 C119 sky.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 hikki-bw C37 sky.jpg]]

''"The sky I see after getting beaten up." Rebuild also [[:Image:Rebuild1 shinji zoning.jpg|adds a cut of Shinji]] listening to his... SDAT... iPOD... whatever... while he gazes at the sky. (More on that in [[Guides:Neon Genesis Evangelion (Misc) vs. Evangelion 1.0|Miscellany]].)''


===Emergency Call===

[[Image:03 C121 rei.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 hikki-bw C39 rei.jpg]]

[[Image:03 C122 shinji,rei.jpg|245px]] [[File:Shinji 1.11.png|320px]]

[[Image:03 C124 rei-run.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 hikki-bw C40 rei-run.jpg]]

''Shinji seems to have relocated himself to the roof of the school after the run-in with Toji. The whole scene is visually redone from scratch, utilizing the cuts and "camera" differently. A breeze has been added for extra flourish. At least Rei's dialogue is exactly the same. Above are just selected cuts from the scene; a full side-by-side will be put off until more "ideal" source material is available.''


===Shelter===

[[File:Shelter.png|245px]] [[File:Shelter 1.11.png|320px]]

[[File:TV.png|245px]] [[File:TV 1.11.png|320px]]

[[File:Bathroom.png|245px]] [[File:Bathroom 1.11.png|320px]]


===Hell with the budget! Need more explosions!!===

[[Image:03 C153 missile-encampment.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 trailer1 C31 artillery.jpg|320px]]

''And for all the artillery nerds, the missile encampment is joined by really big tank... things. You know, to waste even MORE of the tax-payers' money.''


===Battle Formation!===

[[Image:03 C179 shamshel 1.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 trailer2 C28 shamshel 1.jpg|320px]]

[[Image:03 C179 shamshel 2.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 trailer2 C28 shamshel 2.jpg|320px]]

''Shamshel's shift into battle formation is quite different -- and so is Shamshel herself. Note how Shamshel seems to be "unfolding" (rather than simply taking on a vertical posture), as if the bottom of her head had been pressed against the thoracic region and the arthopodian legs are only now being exposed. But without more footage, who knows. The arms have undergone a bit of a ... change -- a bit reminiscent of an alternate scheme for the arm [[Yoshitoh Asari|Asari]] included on one of his [[:Image:Sachiel,shamshel designs asari.jpg|original conceptual illustrations]] for Shammy, in fact. Also note that Shamshel's eye spots are now red. Almost seems like they're trying to reinvent the Angel of Dildoes into something as menacing as possible, and get some good "''kimochi warui!''" out of the audience while they're at it. But more on that later.'' 

''The screencaps here are from the second trailer. The version of the cut found in the second part of the ''Beautiful World'' video is composed somewhat differently. ([[:Image:Rebuild1_hikki-bw2_C19_shamshel.gif|An animation.]])''


==="OH WOW A GIANT PHALLIC ALIEN!"===

[[File:Running.png|245px]] [[File:Running 1.11.png|320px]]

[[Image:03 C180 toji,kensuke.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 toji,kensuke watch.jpg|320px]]


===Ready for Action===

[[Image:03 C188 eva01 1.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 hikki-bw2 C08 eva01 1.jpg]]

[[Image:03 C188 eva01 2.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 hikki-bw2 C08 eva01 2.jpg]]

''The original cut was (probably) handled by the 3rd-string Korean backup animation team -- it don't look so good. Rebuild looks much nicer. Not that you can see it here, but, after exiting the lift, Sho goes "around the bend" instead of straight this time. And...'' 


===Guys dig chicks with big guns===

[[Image:03 C189 eva01-shoot 1.jpg|245px]] [[File:Preparing to shoot.png|320px]]

[[Image:03 C189 eva01-shoot 2.jpg|245px]] [[File:Shooting.png|320px]]

[[Image:03 C189 eva01-shoot 3.jpg|245px]] [[File:Out of ammo.png|320px]]

''The Pallet Rifle is ''soooooo'' 90's. This is 2007! We need a 5-Barrelled Minigun Whatthefuck Animu Weapon! (As one Anonymous put it.) Or, as the canon somewhat more blandly calls it, a "gatling gun".''


==="Now you see me..."===

[[Image:03 C190 shoot-sham 1.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 trailer2 C40 shoot-sham 1.jpg|320px]]

[[Image:03 C190 shoot-sham 2.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 trailer2 C40 shoot-sham 2.jpg|320px]]

''Yes! Bigger flashes!!''


===Tentacle Demon===

[[Image:03 C208 shamshel-comp crop.jpg|235px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 trailer1 C30 shamshel-comp.jpg|320px]]

''Ghod, where to even begin...?''

''The most attention-getting differences involve the thoracic region. Previously, there had been a ventral concavity into which the eight legs neatly folded. In Rebuild, we have this exposed structure creepily resembling a naked rib cage and a spine. Shamshel's legs now all attach to this "spine" and are similarly bone-colored, and, rather than retract during battle, they flail about wildly like those of bug trying to get back on its feet. An additional pair of legs (teeny weeny ones) have been added to the caudal end <small>("towards the rear")</small> of the ensemble, for a total of ten.''

''Also, the core was originally tucked between the V-shaped furrow on the bottom of Shamshel's head and her "collar bones". The "collar bones" look like actual bones now and branch off the top of the "spine" to hug the bottom of the core (which is ''barely'' visible [[:Image:Rebuild1 trailer1 C30 shamshel 1.jpg|at the beginning]] of this panning shot); the arms originally attached to their distal ends, but that no longer seems to be the case. The V-shaped furrow seems to be gone and, instead, Shamshel has a sucker-like mouth with "fangs" hanging on either side. (Easier to see in [[:Image:Rebuild1 shamshel.jpg|this screenshot]].) [[:Image:Rebuild shamshel diagram-mouth.png|This pathetically crude figure]] attempts to highlight some of these differences.''

''Check out where the whips are attached now. The whips are physical organs amplified by energy, so how do those frail-looking arm parts actually support them? And where did the whips come from in the first place? Generated on the fly?''

''Don't worry. This nerdery will be moved later.''


==="Countdown initiated!"===

[[Image:03 C220 countdown.jpg|235px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 trailer2 C42 countdown-1.jpg|320px]]

[[Image:03 C220 countdown.jpg|235px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 trailer2 C42 countdown-2.jpg|320px]]

''Lot more going on here. In Rebuild, the display initially shows a schematic of the "business end" of the umbilical cable (kinda hard to make complete sense of). Then it slides up off the screen and the [[Internal battery|battery]] counter slides down to take its place. Kinda nifty. This cut also confirms the continued presence of our Bridge Bunnies; Hyuga's right where he should be.''


==="Both of you, INSIDE!"===

[[File:Inside Eva.png|235px]] [[File:Inside Eva 1.11.png|320px]]


===Eva-01's hand===

[[File:Humanoid hand.png|235px]] [[File:Humanoid hand 1.11.png|320px]]

''In the anime, Eva-01's hand is darker, probably because of the heat and burns. At 1.11, it's perfectly fine and clean, enhancing its human aspect even more.''


==="That's not a knife. THAT'S a knife!"===

[[Image:03 C282 progknife 1.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 trailer1 C03 prog1.jpg|320px]]

[[Image:03 C282 progknife 2.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 trailer1 C03 prog2.jpg|320px]]

[[Image:03 C282 progknife 3.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 trailer1 C03 prog3.jpg|320px]]

''Showcasing a new knife design and a much more intricate and visually engaging setup. Now the knife is jointed where the blade meets the hilt, and it straightens after being engaged. Nifty. <small>There's that word again.</small>''

[[Image:03 C284 progknife 1.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 trailer1 C07 progknife 1.jpg|320px]]

[[Image:03 C284 progknife 2.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 trailer1 C07 progknife 2.jpg|320px]]

''The original cut is drawn rather poorly, so there’s no contest here. We have the naked hands once again, although they look (A) not terribly damaged, and (B) alarmingly low on the melanin. (Have the Evas abandoned their sleek, swarthy looks?!?) Sho also seems to be holding her left arm kinda funny.''

==="Push, Shinji! PUSH!!"===

[[Image:03 C303 lever.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 trailer2 C49 lever.jpg|320px]]


===Bloodcurdling Shriek of the Damned===

[[Image:03 C305 shinji-scream 1.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 hikki-bw2 C26 shinji-scream 1.jpg|320px]]

[[Image:03 C305 shinji-scream 2.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 hikki-bw2 C26 shinji-scream 2.jpg|320px]]

''Hope Ogata's lungs can still deliver. Shinji's mouth is even bigger this time.''


==="Thirty seconds and counting..."===

[[Image:03 C307 countdown.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 trailer2 C45 countdown.jpg|320px]]


===Post Bellum===

[[Image:03 C326 silhouettes.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 trailer1 C20 silhouette.jpg|320px]]

''No Shamshel corpse for them to collect this time: In Rebuild, the Angels apparently pop like blood-filled balloons once they die, and all that's left of Shamshel are the whips and the "rain of blood" falling down on Sho. "As consolation for your lost Super Solenoid sample, here: have a pretty rainbow."''


← Back to [[Guides:Neon Genesis Evangelion vs. Evangelion 1.0|''Neon Genesis Evangelion'' vs. ''Evangelion 1.0'']].

[[Category:Rebuild of Evangelion]]
[[Category:Comparison Pages]]
html:
← Back to Neon Genesis Evangelion vs. Evangelion 1.0.

Contents

  • 1 Simulation
  • 2 Why throw it away when you can BURN it?
  • 3 Schoolbound
  • 4 Entering the classroom
  • 5 The Girl by the Window
  • 6 Silently Staring
  • 7 The Most One-Sided Fist Fight in Tokyo-3
  • 8 "Sky. Blue sky."
  • 9 Emergency Call
  • 10 Shelter
  • 11 Hell with the budget! Need more explosions!!
  • 12 Battle Formation!
  • 13 "OH WOW A GIANT PHALLIC ALIEN!"
  • 14 Ready for Action
  • 15 Guys dig chicks with big guns
  • 16 "Now you see me..."
  • 17 Tentacle Demon
  • 18 "Countdown initiated!"
  • 19 "Both of you, INSIDE!"
  • 20 Eva-01's hand
  • 21 "That's not a knife. THAT'S a knife!"
  • 22 "Push, Shinji! PUSH!!"
  • 23 Bloodcurdling Shriek of the Damned
  • 24 "Thirty seconds and counting..."
  • 25 Post Bellum

Simulation[edit]

While, in the original series, Shinji simulates combat inside his Eva, in an analog training, in the movie the training is presented as a virtual reality, done in a machine dedicated to the process.

Why throw it away when you can BURN it?[edit]


Schoolbound[edit]

IF YOU DISAGREE YOU ARE WRONG.

Entering the classroom[edit]

Shinji's already plugged into his music when he walks in; seems like he's gotten even more withdrawn. Alternatively, the other students seem to be vesting a bit more interest from the start (except Kensuke, oddly enough). Toji's being even less subtle than before (an amazing accomplishment, all things considered).

If you didn't notice Shinji's switchover to a backpack previously, there it is.


The Girl by the Window[edit]

Straightforward retake. The sling is now tucked beneath Rei's collar, rather than draped over it.


Silently Staring[edit]

Shinji's expression seems much less ... "forlorn" in Rebuild.


The Most One-Sided Fist Fight in Tokyo-3[edit]

The similarities here are very strong. As in, redrawing-the-original-frames-of-animation strong. Not a single unique frame was left behind. A two-in-one animated GIF for your perusal.


"Sky. Blue sky."[edit]

"The sky I see after getting beaten up." Rebuild also adds a cut of Shinji listening to his... SDAT... iPOD... whatever... while he gazes at the sky. (More on that in Miscellany.)


Emergency Call[edit]

Shinji seems to have relocated himself to the roof of the school after the run-in with Toji. The whole scene is visually redone from scratch, utilizing the cuts and "camera" differently. A breeze has been added for extra flourish. At least Rei's dialogue is exactly the same. Above are just selected cuts from the scene; a full side-by-side will be put off until more "ideal" source material is available.


Shelter[edit]


Hell with the budget! Need more explosions!![edit]

And for all the artillery nerds, the missile encampment is joined by really big tank... things. You know, to waste even MORE of the tax-payers' money.


Battle Formation![edit]

Shamshel's shift into battle formation is quite different -- and so is Shamshel herself. Note how Shamshel seems to be "unfolding" (rather than simply taking on a vertical posture), as if the bottom of her head had been pressed against the thoracic region and the arthopodian legs are only now being exposed. But without more footage, who knows. The arms have undergone a bit of a ... change -- a bit reminiscent of an alternate scheme for the arm Asari included on one of his original conceptual illustrations for Shammy, in fact. Also note that Shamshel's eye spots are now red. Almost seems like they're trying to reinvent the Angel of Dildoes into something as menacing as possible, and get some good "kimochi warui!" out of the audience while they're at it. But more on that later.

The screencaps here are from the second trailer. The version of the cut found in the second part of the Beautiful World video is composed somewhat differently. (An animation.)


"OH WOW A GIANT PHALLIC ALIEN!"[edit]


Ready for Action[edit]

The original cut was (probably) handled by the 3rd-string Korean backup animation team -- it don't look so good. Rebuild looks much nicer. Not that you can see it here, but, after exiting the lift, Sho goes "around the bend" instead of straight this time. And...


Guys dig chicks with big guns[edit]

The Pallet Rifle is soooooo 90's. This is 2007! We need a 5-Barrelled Minigun Whatthefuck Animu Weapon! (As one Anonymous put it.) Or, as the canon somewhat more blandly calls it, a "gatling gun".


"Now you see me..."[edit]

Yes! Bigger flashes!!


Tentacle Demon[edit]

Ghod, where to even begin...?

The most attention-getting differences involve the thoracic region. Previously, there had been a ventral concavity into which the eight legs neatly folded. In Rebuild, we have this exposed structure creepily resembling a naked rib cage and a spine. Shamshel's legs now all attach to this "spine" and are similarly bone-colored, and, rather than retract during battle, they flail about wildly like those of bug trying to get back on its feet. An additional pair of legs (teeny weeny ones) have been added to the caudal end ("towards the rear") of the ensemble, for a total of ten.

Also, the core was originally tucked between the V-shaped furrow on the bottom of Shamshel's head and her "collar bones". The "collar bones" look like actual bones now and branch off the top of the "spine" to hug the bottom of the core (which is barely visible at the beginning of this panning shot); the arms originally attached to their distal ends, but that no longer seems to be the case. The V-shaped furrow seems to be gone and, instead, Shamshel has a sucker-like mouth with "fangs" hanging on either side. (Easier to see in this screenshot.) This pathetically crude figure attempts to highlight some of these differences.

Check out where the whips are attached now. The whips are physical organs amplified by energy, so how do those frail-looking arm parts actually support them? And where did the whips come from in the first place? Generated on the fly?

Don't worry. This nerdery will be moved later.


"Countdown initiated!"[edit]

Lot more going on here. In Rebuild, the display initially shows a schematic of the "business end" of the umbilical cable (kinda hard to make complete sense of). Then it slides up off the screen and the battery counter slides down to take its place. Kinda nifty. This cut also confirms the continued presence of our Bridge Bunnies; Hyuga's right where he should be.


"Both of you, INSIDE!"[edit]


Eva-01's hand[edit]

In the anime, Eva-01's hand is darker, probably because of the heat and burns. At 1.11, it's perfectly fine and clean, enhancing its human aspect even more.


"That's not a knife. THAT'S a knife!"[edit]

Showcasing a new knife design and a much more intricate and visually engaging setup. Now the knife is jointed where the blade meets the hilt, and it straightens after being engaged. Nifty. There's that word again.

The original cut is drawn rather poorly, so there’s no contest here. We have the naked hands once again, although they look (A) not terribly damaged, and (B) alarmingly low on the melanin. (Have the Evas abandoned their sleek, swarthy looks?!?) Sho also seems to be holding her left arm kinda funny.

"Push, Shinji! PUSH!!"[edit]


Bloodcurdling Shriek of the Damned[edit]

Hope Ogata's lungs can still deliver. Shinji's mouth is even bigger this time.


"Thirty seconds and counting..."[edit]


Post Bellum[edit]

No Shamshel corpse for them to collect this time: In Rebuild, the Angels apparently pop like blood-filled balloons once they die, and all that's left of Shamshel are the whips and the "rain of blood" falling down on Sho. "As consolation for your lost Super Solenoid sample, here: have a pretty rainbow."


← Back to Neon Genesis Evangelion vs. Evangelion 1.0.

235px 320px

Ghod, where to even begin...?

The most attention-getting differences involve the thoracic region. Previously, there had been a ventral concavity into which the eight legs neatly folded. In Rebuild, we have this exposed structure creepily resembling a naked rib cage and a spine. Shamshel's legs now all attach to this "spine" and are similarly bone-colored, and, rather than retract during battle, they flail about wildly like those of bug trying to get back on its feet. An additional pair of legs (teeny weeny ones) have been added to the caudal end ("towards the rear") of the ensemble, for a total of ten.

Also, the core was originally tucked between the V-shaped furrow on the bottom of Shamshel's head and her "collar bones". The "collar bones" look like actual bones now and branch off the top of the "spine" to hug the bottom of the core (which is barely visible at the beginning of this panning shot); the arms originally attached to their distal ends, but that no longer seems to be the case. The V-shaped furrow seems to be gone and, instead, Shamshel has a sucker-like mouth with "fangs" hanging on either side. (Easier to see in this screenshot.) This pathetically crude figure attempts to highlight some of these differences.

Check out where the whips are attached now. The whips are physical organs amplified by energy, so how do those frail-looking arm parts actually support them? And where did the whips come from in the first place? Generated on the fly?

Don't worry. This nerdery will be moved later.

Article: Guides:Neon Genesis Evangelion (Episode 03) vs. Evangelion 1.0 | Section: "Countdown initiated!"
"Countdown initiated!"

235px 320px

235px 320px

Lot more going on here. In Rebuild, the display initially shows a schematic of the "business end" of the umbilical cable (kinda hard to make complete sense of). Then it slides up off the screen and the battery counter slides down to take its place. Kinda nifty. This cut also confirms the continued presence of our Bridge Bunnies; Hyuga's right where he should be.

Article: Guides:Neon Genesis Evangelion (Episode 03) vs. Evangelion 1.0 | Section: "Both of you, INSIDE!"
"Both of you, INSIDE!"

235px 320px

Article: Guides:Neon Genesis Evangelion (Episode 03) vs. Evangelion 1.0 | Section: Eva-01's hand
Eva-01's hand

235px 320px

In the anime, Eva-01's hand is darker, probably because of the heat and burns. At 1.11, it's perfectly fine and clean, enhancing its human aspect even more.

chunks.section: "That's not a knife. THAT'S a knife!"
chunks.content:
Article: Guides:Neon Genesis Evangelion (Episode 03) vs. Evangelion 1.0 | Section: "That's not a knife. THAT'S a knife!"
"That's not a knife. THAT'S a knife!"

245px 320px

245px 320px

245px 320px

Showcasing a new knife design and a much more intricate and visually engaging setup. Now the knife is jointed where the blade meets the hilt, and it straightens after being engaged. Nifty. There's that word again.

245px 320px

245px 320px

''The original cut is drawn rather poorly, so there’s no contest here. We have the naked hands once again, although they look (A) not terribly damaged, and (B) alarmingly low on the melanin. (Have the Evas abandoned their sleek, swarthy looks?!?) Sho also seems to be holding her left arm kinda funny.

Article: Guides:Neon Genesis Evangelion (Episode 03) vs. Evangelion 1.0 | Section: Post Bellum

Post Bellum

245px 320px

No Shamshel corpse for them to collect this time: In Rebuild, the Angels apparently pop like blood-filled balloons once they die, and all that's left of Shamshel are the whips and the "rain of blood" falling down on Sho. "As consolation for your lost Super Solenoid sample, here: have a pretty rainbow."
